import os, subprocess, re
frames=sorted([f for f in os.listdir('/tmp/ocr1') if f.endswith('.png')])
pat=re.compile(r'>\s*([^\n\r]+)')
seen=[]
for f in frames:
    path='/tmp/ocr1/'+f
    out=subprocess.check_output(['tesseract', path, 'stdout', '--psm', '6'], text=True, errors='ignore')
    cmds=[]
    for m in pat.finditer(out):
        s=m.group(1).strip()
        if s:
            cmds.append(s)
    if cmds:
        print(f, ' | '.join(cmds[:8]))
